name: Blind-Fight
description:
Fighter, Rogue, Investigator Your battle instincts make you more aware of and opponents.

Ranger Your heightened senses allow you to instinctively detect unseen opponents.

You don't need to succeed at a flat check to target concealed creatures. You're not to creatures that are from you (unless you're off-guard to them for reasons other than the hidden condition), and you need only a successful @Check[flat|showDC:all|dc:5] to target a hidden creature.

While you're adjacent to an creature of your level or lower, it is instead only hidden from you.
